title: MetaJudge Benchmark Data v2 (Post-Audit)
description: Post-audit v2 of MetaJudge benchmark data. Changes from v1: adjudication registry adds match_mode 'contains_any' to all 15 abs_* Family B entries, fixing 49 false-negative verbose-answer adjudications. Data files: calibration items (Family A, 117 items), selective abstention items (Family B, 84 items), adjudication registry, and clean subset manifest.
